description: Palo Alto PAN-OS GlobalProtect / management edge CVEs — GlobalProtect command injection (CVE-2024-3400) and management web auth bypass (CVE-2025-0108). Detection-only path fingerprints.

globalprotect_cmdi_2024.description: CVE-2024-3400 — PAN-OS GlobalProtect arbitrary file creation → OS command injection via the SESSID cookie handling on /ssl-vpn/hipreport.esp. Detection = confirm the GlobalProtect HIP-report endpoint is reachable; no injection payload is sent.

probes.description: hipreport.esp reachable (200/other non-404, GlobalProtect markers) = the CVE-2024-3400 command-injection surface is exposed. Fingerprint only.
PAN-OS GlobalProtect portal login fingerprint — confirms the affected product/version family.

mgmt_authbypass_2025.description: CVE-2025-0108 — PAN-OS management web interface authentication bypass allowing an unauthenticated attacker to invoke certain PHP scripts. Detection = reach a management PHP script without auth; no privileged action is taken.

probes.description: Reaching an /unauth-prefixed management PHP script (200, PAN-OS markers, not redirected to login) indicates the CVE-2025-0108 auth-bypass path is exposed. Detection only.
